fields.narrative_intro: *A cringing person and a gloating person discuss $1.65 trillion in hidden AI debt inside a snow globe being violently shaken.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
GLOATING PERSON: "We're saving humanity with AI data centers!"
CRINGING PERSON: "The balance sheet looks... thin."
fields.panel2:
[build]
GLOATING PERSON: "Officially we have $1.35 trillion in debt. Very normal."
CRINGING PERSON: "And unofficially?"
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
GLOATING PERSON: "Shell subsidiaries. Special purpose vehicles. Meta alone: $420 billion."
CRINGING PERSON: "That's... Enron energy."
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: Both characters freeze mid-shake inside the snow globe; fake snow swirls around them; the word 'ENRON' drifts past on a snowflake.]
fields.panel5:
[punch]
CRINGING PERSON: "Tom Selling literally said 'house of cards.'"
GLOATING PERSON: "We prefer 'off-balance-sheet innovation.'"
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: The snow globe base reads 'ALPHABET · MICROSOFT · AMAZON · META · ORACLE — Shake Well Before Investing.']

narrative_summary: Two characters inside a snow globe discover that AI's world-saving ambitions are built on $1.65T in hidden debt, with the Enron comparison literally drifting past as a snowflake, and the globe itself branded with all five implicated companies.
rationale: Candidate 4 ties Candidate 5 on total but edges it out on fit and punchline execution: the escalating reveal of shell subsidiaries, the 'ENRON' snowflake drifting past mid-freeze, and the button gag — 'Shake Well Before Investing' with all five real company names engraved on the globe base — is a genuinely earned visual closer that uses the template's six-panel escalation shape exactly as intended, rather than just restating the Enron comparison one more time.
story_title: AI Companies Are Trying to Hide a Staggering Amount of Debt
place: inside a snow globe being violently shaken
hat_pair: backwards bike helmet with racing stripes
